message:
Add gt doctor --fix for session cleanup in Deacon patrol (gt-psj76.2)

The previous commit only fixed wisp gc, but the session cleanup
was also using non-existent commands. Now session-gc step properly
documents:

1. gt doctor --fix for orphaned sessions and processes
2. bd --no-daemon wisp gc for orphaned wisps

Also noted that log pruning and molecule archival are handled
elsewhere (not implemented / bd mol squash|burn respectively).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@
       "id": "session-gc",
       "title": "Clean dead sessions",
       "needs": ["orphan-check"],
-      "description": "Clean dead sessions.

Garbage collect terminated sessions:
- Remove stale polecat directories
- Clean up orphaned wisps
- Prune old logs and temp files
- Archive completed molecule state

```bash
# Clean wisps older than 1 hour (default threshold)
bd --no-daemon wisp gc

# Or with custom age threshold
bd --no-daemon wisp gc --age 2h

# Preview what would be cleaned
bd --no-daemon wisp gc --dry-run
```

The `--no-daemon` flag is required when the bd daemon is running, since wisp gc needs direct database access.

Preserve audit trail. Only clean sessions confirmed dead."
+      "description": "Clean dead sessions and orphaned state.

Garbage collect terminated sessions and orphaned artifacts:

## 1. Clean orphaned sessions and processes

```bash
# Check for orphans (dry run)
gt doctor -v

# Fix orphaned sessions and processes
gt doctor --fix
```

This handles:
- Orphaned tmux sessions (gt-* not matching valid rig/role patterns)
- Orphaned Claude processes (no tmux parent)

## 2. Clean orphaned wisps

```bash
# Clean wisps older than 1 hour (default threshold)
bd --no-daemon wisp gc

# Or with custom age threshold
bd --no-daemon wisp gc --age 2h

# Preview what would be cleaned
bd --no-daemon wisp gc --dry-run
```

The `--no-daemon` flag is required when the bd daemon is running, since wisp gc needs direct database access.

## Notes

- Preserve audit trail - only clean confirmed dead sessions
- Old logs and temp files: not yet implemented
- Completed molecule archival: handled by bd mol squash/burn"
     },

       "id": "context-check",
